functions.name: SpawnSystemAtLocation
functions.description: Spawns a Niagara System at the specified world location/rotation

functions.name: SetVolumeTextureObject
functions.description: Overrides the Volume Texture for a Niagara Volume Texture Data Interface User Parameter.

functions.name: SetTextureObject
functions.description: Overrides the Texture Object for a Niagara Texture Data Interface User Parameter.

functions.name: SetTexture2DArrayObject
functions.description: Overrides the 2D Array Texture for a Niagara 2D Array Texture Data Interface User Parameter.

functions.name: SetSkeletalMeshDataInterfaceSamplingRegions
functions.description: Sets the SamplingRegion to use on the skeletal mesh data interface, this is destructive as it modifies the data interface.

functions.name: SetSkeletalMeshDataInterfaceFilteredSockets
functions.description: Sets the Filtered Sockets to use on the skeletal mesh data interface, this is destructive as it modifies the data interface.

functions.name: SetSkeletalMeshDataInterfaceFilteredBones
functions.description: Sets the Filtered Bones to use on the skeletal mesh data interface, this is destructive as it modifies the data interface.

functions.name: SetSceneCapture2DDataInterfaceManagedMode
functions.description: Sets managed mode parameters for the Scene capture 2D  data interface, this is destructive as it modifies the data interface.

functions.name: SetComponentNiagaraGPURayTracedCollisionGroup
functions.description: Sets the Niagara GPU ray traced collision group for the give primitive component.

functions.name: SetActorNiagaraGPURayTracedCollisionGroup
functions.description: Sets the Niagara GPU ray traced collision group for all primitive components on the given actor.

functions.name: ReleaseNiagaraGPURayTracedCollisionGroup
functions.description: Releases a collision group back to the system for use by ohers.

functions.name: OverrideSystemUserVariableStaticMeshComponent
functions.description: Sets a Niagara StaticMesh parameter by name, overriding locally if necessary.

functions.name: OverrideSystemUserVariableSkeletalMeshComponent
functions.description: Sets a Niagara StaticMesh parameter by name, overriding locally if necessary.

functions.name: GetNiagaraParameterCollection
functions.description: This is gonna be totally reworked

functions.name: AcquireNiagaraGPURayTracedCollisionGroup
functions.description: Returns a free collision group for use in HWRT collision group filtering. Returns -1 on failure.
